resume.summary: Motivated B.Tech Computer Science student with a strong analytical foundation in statistics, machine learning, and data visualization. Experienced in extracting actionable insights from complex datasets. Seeking a Data Scientist Internship to apply data-driven problem solving in a real-world setting.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology — Computer Science & Engineering (Data Science)
education.coursework: Relevant Coursework: Statistics, Machine Learning, Data Visualization, Big Data Fundamentals, Linear Algebra

technicalSkills.skillGroup: Scikit-learn, Statsmodels, Hypothesis Testing, Regression, Classification
Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Power BI, Tableau
Jupyter Notebook, Git, GitHub, Google Colab

experience.title: Data Science Intern — Synapse Analytics Pvt. Ltd., Pune

bullets.bullet: Built predictive models for customer churn, achieving 84% accuracy and informing retention strategy.
Cleaned and analysed datasets of 50,000+ rows, identifying key drivers of business KPIs.
Created interactive Power BI dashboards adopted by 3 business teams for weekly reporting.
Built a churn prediction model achieving 86% F1-score on imbalanced data using SMOTE.
Identified top 5 churn drivers through SHAP-based feature importance analysis.
Built a time-series forecasting model with under 8% MAPE on monthly sales data.
Designed an interactive dashboard for stakeholders to explore forecasts by region.

project.title: Exploratory Data Analysis on Public Health Data

bullets.bullet: Conducted EDA on a 100,000-record public health dataset, surfacing 6 key correlations.
Presented findings via a structured report and visualization deck.

certification.title: Python for Data Science and AI

achievements.achievement: Selected among 80 students college-wide for the Smart India Hackathon (SIH 2024) internal round.
Received the Academic Excellence Award for Semester 2 with the highest GPA (9.3) in the CSE department cohort of 120 students.
Active contributor to two college-wide technical fests, coordinating logistics and technical sessions for 150+ participants.

extracurricular.activity: Core Member, Technical Club, VIT Pune — organised hands-on workshops for 150+ students (2023–Present).
Technical Blogger — published articles on Medium covering tools and best practices relevant to the field; collectively read 4,000+ times.
Volunteer Mentor, CodeForGood (NGO Initiative) — guided 15 high school students through technology fundamentals over an 8-week programme.
